title: oxymeris agrestis
intro: Oxymeris agrestis is a plant species, also known as the "wild ironwort" or "wood ironwort," which belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Oxymeris agrestis are derived from its leaves, which contain flavonoids and other compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxymeris agrestis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Oxymeris agrestis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
